violations.text: The FRP on one of the walls was observed off the wall. FRP wall to be repaired to ensure wall is covered in approved material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The hand sink in the back was observed leaking when used. Leak to be repaired New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
The FRP on one wall in the back kitchen area has peeled off. Wall to be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The floors in various locations of the facility have a very small accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC to clean facility and inform pest control of any locations of droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, class will be taken before April 10th. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan in the ware washing area have an accumulation of dust. Fan to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025

The floor in the dry storage and walk-in freezer area has an accumulation of rodent droppings and miscellaneous debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2025
